productName: Stars & Rosin - 99 Sunsets x Banana Cream rosin - .5g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on 99 Sunsets and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a creamy, sweet banana flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
